summary: CapyMatch Task Row Patterns Testing - All features working correctly. Tested task rows with overflow menu, inline edit, owner badges (Coach indigo, Athlete teal), due dates, OVERDUE tags, and Add Task modal with dark theme dropdown.
critical_code_review_comments: TaskItem component correctly implements overflow menu (⋯) with Edit, Mark Complete, Reassign, Follow Up options
Owner badges properly color-coded: Coach=indigo, Athlete=teal, Director=purple
OVERDUE tag displays correctly for past-due tasks
Nudge button only shows for overdue athlete-owned tasks (correct per requirements)
AddTaskModal uses dark theme (#161b25) with custom dropdown matching app modals

success_rate.backend: 100% - PATCH endpoint supports status, owner, title updates

seed_data_creation: Created test task 'Test Task 679830' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Task row patterns verified: (1) '+Add' modal with dark theme dropdown opens correctly, (2) Overflow menu (⋯) appears on hover with Edit/Mark Complete/Reassign/Follow Up options, (3) Inline edit shows input with Save/Esc buttons, (4) Mark Complete updates task status and moves to COMPLETED section, (5) Owner badges color-coded (Coach=indigo, Athlete=teal), (6) OVERDUE tag visible on past-due tasks in red, (7) Nudge button only for overdue athlete-owned tasks, (8) Menu closes on outside click. Backend PATCH endpoint at /api/support-pods/{athlete_id}/school/{program_id}/actions/{action_id} tested successfully.

frontend_ui: Login as coach and navigate to School Pod - PASSED
Tasks section displays with '+ Add' button - PASSED
Task rows show title, owner badge (color-coded), due date - PASSED
OVERDUE tag visible on past-due task (Emory) - PASSED
Overflow menu (⋯) opens on click (force=True for opacity-0 element) - PASSED
Overflow menu has Edit, Mark Complete, Reassign, Follow Up options - PASSED
Edit from menu shows inline input with Save/Esc buttons - PASSED
Mark Complete moves task to COMPLETED section - PASSED
Add Task modal opens with dark theme - PASSED
Modal closes after task creation - PASSED
Overflow menu closes on outside click - PASSED

verified_requirements.ADD_MODAL_PRIMARY: PASS - '+ Add' button opens AddTaskModal for task creation
verified_requirements.OVERFLOW_MENU_MANAGEMENT: PASS - Overflow menu (⋯) with Edit, Mark Complete, Reassign, Follow Up options
verified_requirements.NO_ALWAYS_VISIBLE_CTAS: PASS - No always-visible CTAs duplicate 'assign to athlete'
verified_requirements.NUDGE_FOR_OVERDUE_ATHLETE: PASS - Nudge CTA only appears for overdue athlete-owned tasks
verified_requirements.INLINE_EDIT: PASS - Edit shows inline input with Save/Esc buttons
verified_requirements.DARK_THEME_DROPDOWN: PASS - AddTaskModal uses dark theme (#161b25) matching app modals
